title: 'We are the champions!'
description: GOLF NEWS - The Knysna Ladies Golf At Home...
bodyText:
GOLF NEWS - The Knysna Ladies Golf At Home Day, themed 'We are the Champions', re-ignited the rugby world cup gees.

Food Lovers Market (FLM) Knysna through an incredible sponsorship made sure everyone experienced that winning feeling again.


> The ladies were spoiled with a great breakfast, halfway boerie rolls and 'grab and go' snacks, followed by a typical local cuisine lunch.


Prizes were valued at R40 000 which ensured that each winning team received a Le Creuset cookware set to hero the wonderful produce that FLM sources daily for its customers.

Waterfront Drive Seattle Coffee Shop supplied the early morning coffees and Knysna Gin & Beer the halfway 'Bomb Squad' beers.

The organisers thank everyone who participated in celebrating the 'World Cup' champions and for making the day a success.

The nominated charity for the day was Epilepsy Knysna.

Participants of the 'We Are the Champions' Knysna Ladies' Golf Day on the 18th green.


> The winners were:


- Jill Rose and Marisa Raffinetti (47pts)
- Lynn Wilkinson and Nola-Ann May (45pts)
- Lee Varrie and Trace Mills (45pts)
- Audrey Maynard and Jill Fotheringham (44pts)
- Melissa Botha and Ilze de Villiers (44pts)
- Barbara Burgess and Alison Muir (43pts)
- Barbara Ribeiro and Julia Read (43pts)
- Elke Heinrich and Annette Fahrenhampher (43pts).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
